item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-08 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI (+1938 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1938，总 stars 11,204，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search (+5657 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI DevTool / Observability Description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews. Why it matters: AI DevTool / Observability 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +5657，总 stars 14,022，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] milvus-io/milvus (+34 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Vector Database / Embedding Description: Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search Why it matters: Vector Database / Embedding 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +34，前 3 日均值 10，加速度 3.4x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] thedaviddias/Front-End-Checklist (+17 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A comprehensive, MCP-powered front-end quality checklist with 385 rules across 11 categories, designed for both human developers and AI agents. Why it matters: With 72,971 stars, a 24-hour star delta of 14, and a high acceleration of 2.2, this project is experiencing a sudden breakout in attention. The recent release and active commits (within 7 days) indicate ongoing development, making it a timely resource for developers adopting AI-assisted workflows. Developer insight: This signals a growing trend of turning static documentation into machine-consumable, agent-friendly formats. For AI developers, it demonstrates how to package domain knowledge (e.g., front-end rules) as MCP tools, enabling agents to perform structured, reliable code reviews without hallucination. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+11 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: Machine Learning Engineering Open Book Why it matters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +11，前 3 日均值 4，加速度 2.8x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看数据接入、检索质量和 production workflow，而不是只看 demo 效果。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] addyosmani/agent-skills (+2339 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +2339，前 3 日均值 683.7，加速度 3.4x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+1100 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1100，总 stars 35,448，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1046 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1046，总 stars 53,092，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] mvanhorn/last30days-skill (+788 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +788，总 stars 50,548，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks (+2201 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +2201，前 3 日均值 1094.3，加速度 2x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low
